title: OHP ASSISTANCE AND HEALTH NAVIGATION - 211info
text: EL CENTRO NW OHP ASSISTANCE AND HEALTH NAVIGATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support with Oregon Health Plan (OHP) applications, renewals, updates, questions, billing issues, and document uploads. Ensures signers understand documents and have valid ID for verification. Helps find culturally appropriate health services. 300 S Roosevelt Drive Suite #5 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Latinx/Hispanic community members or Spanish language speakers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (971) 414-7270 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 414-7270 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Certificates/Forms Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Medicaid Information/Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT AND TAX PREPARATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL CENTRO NW
